allow: Bash(export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI" && gh auth status 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI" && gh repo create myBlog --private --source=. --remote=origin --push)
Bash(export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI" && gh repo edit myBlog --visibility public --accept-visibility-change-consequences)
Bash(export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI" && gh repo edit Seongyeonn-Hwang/myBlog --visibility public --accept-visibility-change-consequences)
Bash(node gen_blog.js && git add . && git commit -m "update: blog contents" && git push)
